TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang paran ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 686 buwan, 1,940 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 590 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 1,350 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Setik 17%, Tayan 10%, Bunun 2%, Paywan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na paran hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na paran hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na paran hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na paran hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na paran hya' ga snuwing. tay 'llaw na paran hya' ga toda. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 2 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ paran ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕetik **%, tajan **%, βunun *%, pajwan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na paran ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na paran ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na paran ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na paran ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na paran ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕnuwiŋ. taj ʔllaw na paran ħjaʔ ɣa to*a. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang paran ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 686 buwan, 1,940 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 590 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 1,350 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Setik 17%, Tayan 10%, Bunun 2%, Paywan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na paran hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na paran hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na paran hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na paran hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na paran hya' ga snuwing. tay 'llaw na paran hya' ga toda. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 2 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ paran ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕetik **%, tajan **%, βunun *%, pajwan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na paran ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na paran ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na paran ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na paran ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na paran ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕnuwiŋ. taj ʔllaw na paran ħjaʔ ɣa to*a. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
